pageSubtitle: Drag the stars to unlock extra stories and more
helpText:
Drag stars: Touch and move any star freely across the sky.

Form constellations: Bring stars close to the marked points to complete each figure.

Unlock stories: Each completed constellation unlocks a special story from Iruma's blog related to AdaShima.

Final reward: By completing all 10 constellations you will get access to all stories and 2 special information cards about Adachi and Shimamura.

Progress saved: Your progress will be automatically stored so you can come back later and download the stories or cards without needing to complete everything again.
resetConfirm: Reset stars? Unlocks will be kept.
downloadAllText: The unlocked stories and additional/exclusive content are inside the compiled PDF.
profileAdachiName:
My name is Adachi Sakura.
Shimamura calls me Adachi.
My birthday is October 19th.
My zodiac sign is Libra,
and my blood type is A.
I consider myself normal, but Shimamura says I'm weird.
profileShimamuraName:
My name is Shimamura Hougetsu.
Everyone calls me Shimamura!
My birthday is April 10th.
My zodiac sign is Aries,
and my blood type is B.
As for my personality, I consider myself a calm person, but those around me often say I'm apathetic.
profileAdachiReborn: Any animal that Shimamura likes the most
profileAdachiHeart: Those occasional moments when she laughs with all her heart
profileShimamuraVacation: Adachi would probably come every day, so something with her
profileShimamuraHeart: When she gets all nervous and blushing, but doesn't look away
profileLabelReborn: What would you like to be reborn as?
profileLabelVacation: If you could take a year-long vacation, what would you do?
profileLabelCall: What do you want your partner to call you?
profileLabelHeart: What gesture makes your heart race?
profileLabelDate: Where would you like to go on a date?
